title: Oresouls
description: These ores are found in the normal dimension as well as in the ender world
body:
![hello](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccffe26d92084f647e5169f7a5e854a900bfa5be.png)
Hello this mod features three ores from which various items are crafted the ores are called neocid, enderium, coltbalt, for example. 

Enderium spawns in end, neocid spawns in the overworld,coltbalt spawns in the underworld and has only different variations of tools, neocid has tools as well as armor, 

And enderium has the strongest armor of all presented but is inferior in tools to coltbalt, also in the mod there is diamond stick which is used in crafting various objects
